nodes.name: Webhook: New Client Signup
nodes.notes: SETUP: Fire this webhook from your payment processor (Stripe, PayPal, Gumroad) after payment confirmation. Or fire from your signup form. POST JSON with: name, email, company (optional), plan (optional).

nodes.name: Add to Drip Tracker Sheet
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create sheet tab 'Drip_Tracker' with columns: Client_ID | Name | Email | Company | Plan | Signup_Date | Day0_Sent | Day1_Sent | Day3_Sent | Day7_Sent | Day14_Sent | Status

parameters.subject: =💡 5 ways to get the most from your automations
parameters.message:
=

💡 Day 1: Quick wins for {{ $('Parse Client Data').first().json.first_name }}

Your automations are running. Here's how to squeeze every bit of value from them:

  1. ✅ Test with a real submission — submit a test lead or send a test email to see the whole flow fire.
  2. 📊 Check your Google Sheet weekly — that's your live data hub. Review it every Monday morning.
  3. ✏️ Customize email templates — edit the text in your workflows to match your brand voice exactly.
  4. 🔗 Add the tracking snippet to your website — it'll start capturing funnel data you've never had access to before.
  5. ⚡ Share your webhook URLs — your forms, payment processor, and booking tools should all point to your n8n webhooks.

Tomorrow we'll check in and offer a quick setup call if you'd like one.

REPLACE_WITH_COMPANY_NAME | Unsubscribe

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Catches errors from any node in the sequence.

motionElevation.description:
SETUP README:

DRIP SEQUENCE SCHEDULE:
  Day 0:  Welcome email + dashboard access
  Day 1:  5 tips to get the most from automations
  Day 3:  Check-in + optional Calendly setup call
  Day 7:  First week summary
  Day 14: Upsell email (add automation for €50/month)

INTEGRATION:
  Fire the webhook when a new client pays. Integrate with:
  - Stripe: Use Stripe webhooks → filter for payment_intent.succeeded
  - PayPal: IPN webhooks on payment_completed
  - Gumroad: Ping URL on sale
  - Typeform/Webflow form: Fire on submission after manual review
  POST body should include: { "name": "...", "email": "...", "plan": "..." }

REPLACE THESE VALUES:
  - REPLACE_WITH_COMPANY_NAME: Your agency name
  - REPLACE_WITH_SENDER_EMAIL: Your sending email address
  - REPLACE_WITH_DASHBOARD_URL: URL of client dashboard or portal
  - REPLACE_WITH_CALENDLY_URL: Your Calendly booking link
  - REPLACE_WITH_UPSELL_URL: Landing page or Stripe payment link for upsell
  - REPLACE_WITH_UNSUBSCRIBE_URL: Unsubscribe/preference management page
  - REPLACE_WITH_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID: Your tracking spreadsheet ID

GOOGLE SHEETS TAB 'Drip_Tracker':
  Client_ID | Name | Email | Company | Plan | Signup_Date | Day0_Sent | Day1_Sent | Day3_Sent | Day7_Sent | Day14_Sent | Status

NOTE: n8n persists waiting executions in the database. If n8n restarts, waiting executions resume from where they left off.
